title: scypharia tetragona
intro: Scypharia tetragona, also known as the Fourhorn Scypharia, is a species of mushroom in the family Scyphariaceae. It is a type of edible fungus that grows in clusters on the ground, particularly in shaded areas. The medicinal properties of Scypharia tetragona include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health. This plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion or dried extract for its medicinal benefits, and it has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and hyperlipidemia.
